briefdescription.para: Macro for getting ID of current module.
Number of bits used to encode log level.
Number of slots in one word.
Maximum number of backends supported when runtime filtering is enabled.

memberdef.name: LOG_FILTER_SLOT_SET
memberdef.initializer: do { \ uint32_t others = *(_filters) & ~(LOG_FILTER_SLOT_MASK << \ LOG_FILTER_SLOT_SHIFT(_id)); \ *(_filters) = others | (((_filter) & LOG_FILTER_SLOT_MASK) << \ LOG_FILTER_SLOT_SHIFT(_id)); \ } while (false)

briefdescription.para: Log level value used to indicate log entry that should not be formatted (raw string).
Creates name of variable and section for runtime log data.
Get index of the log source based on the address of the constant data associated with the source.
Get index of the log source based on the address of the dynamic data associated with the source.
Get index of the log source based on the address of the associated data.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the data structure (dynamic if runtime filtering is enabled and static otherwise).

simplesect.para: This function is intended to be used when porting other log systems.
